ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your registered email. If the account exists, we will send a password reset link.
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email, a password reset link has been sent.

LoginForm.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during login.

RegisterForm.registerSuccess: Please check your email to verify your account!
RegisterForm.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during registration.

VerifyEmail.successMsg: Email verified successfully! You can now log in.
VerifyEmail.failedMsg: Verification failed or the link has expired. Please try again.
VerifyEmail.title: Email Verification
VerifyEmail.redirecting: You will be redirected to the login page in a few seconds...

VerifyEmailInfo.title: Check your email to verify your account
VerifyEmailInfo.description1: We have sent a verification email to the address you just registered.
VerifyEmailInfo.description2: Please check your inbox (including Spam/Junk) and follow the instructions to activate your account.
VerifyEmailInfo.emailNotFound: Email not found. Please register again or check your verification link.
VerifyEmailInfo.emailNotFoundAPI: This email was not found. Please check again.
VerifyEmailInfo.errorChecking: An error occurred while checking verification status.
VerifyEmailInfo.afterVerify: After verification, you can log in to the system.
VerifyEmailInfo.success: Verification successful! Redirecting to login page...
VerifyEmailInfo.redirectInfo: You will be redirected to the login page after successful verification.

ResetPassword.passwordRequirement: Password must be at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters
ResetPassword.resetSuccess: Password reset successfully. Please log in again
ResetPassword.resetFailed: Could not reset password. Please try again
ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for account {email}.
ResetPassword.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
